properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Some glad morning when this life is o'er I'll fly away, To a home on God's celestial shore, I'll fly away.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'll fly away, oh glory, I'll fly away; when I'm gone hallelujah by and by, I'll fly away.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When the shadows of this life have grown, I'll fly away. Like a bird from prison bars has flown, I'll fly away.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Just a few more Weary days and then, I'll fly away; To a land where joys shall never end, I'll fly away.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'll fly away, oh glory, I'll fly away; I cannot die hallelujah by and by, I'll fly away.
